channel.title: Alex Blania Case Study: The Human Layer of the Internet
channel.description: A comprehensive business case study examining Alex Blania's strategic challenge as co-founder of multiple AI-era companies. This case explores the intersection of proof-of-human technology, social networks, and the future of digital identity in an AI-abundant world.
channel.itunes:author: Amanda Bradford
channel.itunes:summary: A comprehensive business case study examining Alex Blania's strategic challenge as co-founder of multiple AI-era companies, exploring proof-of-human technology and the future of digital identity.

item.title: Alex Blania and the Human Layer of the Internet
item.description:
A comprehensive business case study examining Alex Blania's strategic challenge as the repeat co-founder of multiple AI-era companies. This case explores the "third-founder problem" and the intersection of proof-of-human technology, social networks, and digital identity.
Topics covered include: - The third-founder problem: World, Merge Labs, and Nara - Alex Blania's background as physicist turned CEO - The Sam Altman connection and strategic relationship - Technical infrastructure vs. market adoption challenges - The future of proof-of-human technology - Strategic options for building the human layer of the internet
Case prepared for strategic analysis and decision-making discussion.
item.itunes:author: Amanda Bradford
item.itunes:summary: Complete business case study on Alex Blania's multi-company strategy in the AI era
